requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and Georgian Port Entry
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3与格鲁吉亚口岸入境
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3與喬治亞口岸入境

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks must be shipped under dangerous goods rules. In practice for Georgia, transporters and cargo operators apply UN 38.3 test-report requirements, class 9 dangerous goods labeling logic, and route-appropriate documentation for sea and road legs through ports such as Poti and Batumi. Safe design and test evidence also supports customs and regulator questions at first contact, especially where battery packs are large volume or high-power.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源运输需遵守危险品规则。实际进出格鲁吉亚时，运输商通常要求UN 38.3测试报告、危险货物第9类标识和按航运/陆运路径的货物文件，海运通常经由Poti与Batumi口岸。安全设计与测试证据有助于在入境首站降低审核阻滞，尤其是大容量或高功率电池。
summary.zht: 鋰電池與行動電源運輸需遵守危險品規則。實際進出喬治亞時，運輸商通常要求UN 38.3測試報告、第9類危險貨物標識及按航運/陸運路徑的貨物文件，海運通常經由Poti與Batumi口岸。安全設計與測試證據有助於入境首站降低審核阻滯，尤其是大容量或高功率電池。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III Section 38.3
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations for air shipment
ICAO Technical Instructions and carrier dangerous-goods handling requirements

summary.en: Chinese GB 31241 baseline and CCC testing are product safety frameworks for market access inside China and are not sufficient transport documents for Georgia or other international hazardous goods routes. Exporters should retain UN 38.3 and carrier-specific dangerous goods records independent from domestic GB routes.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31241和CCC属于国内产品安全框架，不是国际危险品运输或格鲁吉亚清关所需的完整文件。出口商应保留与UN 38.3及船/空/陆运承运人规则一致的独立运输档案。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31241和CCC屬於國內產品安全框架，不是國際危險品運輸或喬治亞清關所需的完整文件。出口商應保留與UN 38.3及船/空/陸運承運人規則一致的獨立運輸檔案。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — safety baseline for portable lithium battery packs in China
CNCA/CNAS conformity instruments and CCC scope notices

gap.en: The biggest gap is scope: UN 38.3 and carrier-level dangerous goods controls are mandatory internationally and can determine whether cargo clears at Georgian ports. Chinese domestic conformity documents help engineering control but cannot replace the transport-level evidence required for cross-border movement.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于适用范围。UN 38.3与承运人危险品要求是国际通行的强制条件，会直接影响货物在格鲁吉亚口岸放行。中国国内合规文件有助于工程管理，但不能替代跨境运输所需的运输证据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於適用範圍。UN 38.3與承運人危險品要求是國際通行的強制條件，會直接影響貨物在喬治亞口岸放行。中國國內合規文件有助於工程管理，但不能替代跨境運輸所需的運輸證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation for international shipment into Georgian market channels — dangerous goods transport documentation and UN 38.3 evidence are required irrespective of GB 31241 status.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic transport market checks — GB 31241 governs domestic safety expectations but does not replace international dangerous-goods obligations for export shipments.

source.publisher: UN Economic Commission for Europe — dangerous goods transport guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Exporters should treat UN 38.3 as mandatory for all lithium battery and power bank export lots irrespective of destination. For Georgia, verify packaging, declaration and port-level routing conditions for Poti and Batumi before shipment booking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口商应将UN 38.3作为所有锂电池和移动电源跨境运输的刚性要求。面向格鲁吉亚时，应在下单前核实包装、申报与经Poti、Batumi港的流转要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口商應將UN 38.3作為所有鋰電池和行動電源跨境運輸的剛性要求。面向喬治亞時，應在下單前核實包裝、申報與經Poti、Batumi港的流轉要求。
